title: Lord's Pc Mod
description: Adds decorative pc blocks and accessories!
body:
This mod will add placeable PCs and peripherals into Minecraft!

Each model was made by me in Blockbench.

This mod was made using MCreator.

 


### New update: New PC, Paintings and Play buttons!

 

Currently, There are:

- 8 PCs

- RGB Keyboards & Mice

- An RGB Headset Stand

- Monitors & TVs

- RGB Strip lights

- Paintings

- Youtube Play Buttons (Gold & Silver)

- Canada & Christmas themed pcs & peripherals

 

### These blocks are for decoration only and do not have any functions.

Credit to Custom PC Tycoon on Roblox for inspiration for the mod and a lot of the parts.
